user_message: what does CAC mean in plain English?
assistant_message: CAC means customer acquisition cost. In plain English, it is what you spend to get one new client or customer. If you spend $1,000 on ads, referrals, sales time, or other acquisition work and that produces one new client, your CAC is $1,000. The reason I care about it is simple: your first-sale gross profit needs to be high enough to pay that CAC back quickly.
